_source: Reconstructed from Luyen's personal Google Calendar (luyen.chou@gmail.com), retrieved 2026-07-15.
_caveats: Google all-day events use an EXCLUSIVE end date; multi-day spans below are interpreted, not stated. Verify against photo EXIF timestamps.
A 'Fishing: Armstrong' event (Jul 15-17) exists on the calendar but Luyen confirmed it is spurious — Armstrong was NOT fished on this trip. Excluded.
Guides, outfitters, put-in/take-out points, and beat assignments are NOT in the calendar. Need Granola debriefs or Luyen's recollection.
